name: Land O'Lakes, Inc.
summary: Land O'Lakes, Inc. is a farmer-owned cooperative and a major player in the U.S. dairy industry. The company operates in three primary segments: Dairy Foods, Animal Nutrition, and Crop Inputs. Dairy Foods produces and markets a wide range of dairy products for consumers and foodservice customers. Animal Nutrition provides feed and related products for livestock and pets. Crop Inputs offers seeds, crop protection products, and agronomic services to farmers.
